_notes.scope: Fully self-contained — the workspace reads/writes only inside ./. No external (Thinking Brain / Knowledge Base / AIOS) paths. sops/, skills/, agents/, and CLAUDE.md are read-only (the operating layer); profile, config, trackers, references, logs, and rules are writable (the owner's data, filled by onboard and the skills).
_notes.calendar: Google Calendar MCP intentionally NOT enabled by default. Turn on config.json.calendar and add the create_event/list_events/suggest_time MCP allows here only if the owner wants the call-booking calendar gate.
